system.description: Once per session, you may Reach Out! to a contact in your current Locale. When creating a new Contact, tell the Director their name and Expertise, and roll +Charm. You may have a maximum of 5 Contacts. You can replace any Contact with a +0 or higher Rating; Contacts with a -1 Rating must be improved to +0 or greater (with Convince!) before being replaced.

failure.value: Either you don't find your Contact and find unexpected trouble instead, OR the Contact is a rival or holds an old grudge and MUST be added with a -1 Rating.

partial.value: The Contact is neutral towards you. Add them with a Rating of +0.

success.value: The Contact is positively disposed to you or owes you a favor. Add them with a Rating of +1.

critical.value: The Contact is an old friend and will do almost anything you ask (within reason). Add them with a Rating of +2.
